Class EfsTimeEndpoint.Builder

org.efs.feed.EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<EfsTimeEndpoint>
org.efs.feed.EfsTimeEndpoint.Builder

EfsTimeEndpoint

Builder class for EfsTimeEndpoint.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

    Description
    protected EfsTimeEndpoint
    buildImpl()
    Returns a new EfsTimeEndpoint instance based on this builder's settings.
    EfsTimeEndpoint.Builder

    Sets endpoint to Instant.MAX, interval location to EfsIntervalEndpoint.IntervalLocation.FUTURE, and clusivity to EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity.EXCLUSIVE.

    Sets endpoint time to current time, interval location to EfsIntervalEndpoint.IntervalLocation.NOW, and clusivity to given value.

  • Field Details

    • TIME_NULL

      public static final String TIME_NULL
      When attempting to set endpoint time to null, then NullPointerException contains message "time is null".
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • buildImpl

      protected EfsTimeEndpoint buildImpl()
      Returns a new EfsTimeEndpoint instance based on this builder's settings.
      Specified by:
      buildImpl in class EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<EfsTimeEndpoint>
      Returns:
      new EfsTimeEndpoint instance.

    • time

      public EfsTimeEndpoint.Builder time(Instant time, EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity clusivity)
      Sets interval time and clusivity. Time interval location is based on whether time is < or ≥ to current time. Returns this Builder instance so that builder method calls can be chained.
      Parameters:
      time - interval time.
      clusivity - interval time clusivity.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if either time or clusivity is null. Note: if this is the case, then neither time nor clusivity is set.
      See Also:
      • now(Clusivity)

    • now

      public EfsTimeEndpoint.Builder now(EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity clusivity)
      Sets endpoint time to current time, interval location to EfsIntervalEndpoint.IntervalLocation.NOW, and clusivity to given value. When clusivity is combined with interval location, this defines whether interval begins/ends at the current time or just after/before. Returns this Builder instance so builder method calls can be chained.
      Parameters:
      clusivity - endpoint clusivity.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if clusivity is null. If this is the case, then time and location are not set.

    • endNever

      public EfsTimeEndpoint.Builder endNever()
      Sets endpoint to Instant.MAX, interval location to EfsIntervalEndpoint.IntervalLocation.FUTURE, and clusivity to EfsIntervalEndpoint.Clusivity.EXCLUSIVE. This setting can only be used as an ending endpoint since it is always > any other endpoint. Returns this Builder instance so that builder method calls can be chained.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.

    • validate

      protected net.sf.eBus.util.Validator validate(net.sf.eBus.util.Validator problems)
      Verifies that time is set.
      Overrides:
      validate in class EfsIntervalEndpoint.EndpointBuilder<EfsTimeEndpoint>
      Parameters:
      problems - append invalid setting messages to this list.
      Returns:
      problems.
